title: Section 447
content: 1[A Judicial Magistrate of the first class or a Metropolitan Magistrate, as the case may be,] imposing a fine under this Act may, if he thinks fit, direct the whole or any part thereof to be applied in compensating any person for any detriment which he may have sustained by the act or default in respect of which the fine is imposed or in or towards payment of the expenses of the prosecution.
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 17 and the Schedule, for "A Magistrate" (w.e.f. 18-5-1983).
